sys_ws_operation.description: POST handler for the Case Submit scripted REST API. Anonymously accepts a JSON payload containing the whitelisted fields { subject, type, description, requester_name, requester_email } from the Experience Portal submission widget. Delegates to x_casemgmt.CasePortalService.submitCase() which inserts a new x_casemgmt_case row with status=Draft and silently drops any non-whitelisted fields. On success, returns HTTP 201 with body { number, message: 'Your case has been submitted' }. On validation failure, returns HTTP 400 with body { error }. On defensive fallback (Script Include returned no number and no error - should never happen if the Script Include conforms to its contract), returns HTTP 500 with body { error: 'Submission failed.' }. Replaces ArkCase's DefaultPluggablePortalRequestService.submitRequest() Spring service for the Case Submit slice. Anonymous access is enabled by setting requires_authentication=false, requires_acl_authorization=false, and requires_snc_internal_role=false; the privacy perimeter is the field whitelist in the Script Include, not table-level ACLs. Per AAP Sections 0.4.3, 0.4.4, 0.5.1, 0.7.4 (verbatim).
sys_ws_operation.name: Case Submit POST
sys_ws_operation.short_description: Anonymous POST handler for case submission. Returns HTTP 201 with { number, message: 'Your case has been submitted' } on success, HTTP 400 with { error } on validation failure, or HTTP 500 with { error: 'Submission failed.' } on defensive fallback. Per AAP Sections 0.4.3, 0.4.4, 0.5.1, 0.7.4.
